Yen. The native will be an intelligent
Sun Mer.
Moon person; but will have only medium
education. He will have abundant faith
Sat. Dt. in God and will be respectful to elderly
persons. He will be oversexed. He will
have four sons and three daughters. He
Dh. will have an elder brother. He will go
away from home, come back and then
Jupl: Mars secure a good position iii fife. He will

108 BHRIGUNANDINADl
prove a good businessman; but he will be highly extravagant. He will plod for
women folk. He will not live with his mother under happy conditions. He will
be an independent type. He will wander .about till his 25th year. Then he will
start his own concern. He will begin to deal in clothes, and also take up
tailoring. After 28-29, he will begin to earn by several ways. He will get a bad
name at 23, 26, 30 and 31 through his female acquaintances. He will get
married at26.
